title: NSAID caution
text: NSAIDs may increase GI bleeding risk and can worsen kidney function in susceptible patients.

title: Acetaminophen ceiling
text: Typical maximum adult daily acetaminophen dose is 4 grams; lower limits may apply with liver disease or chronic alcohol use.

title: ACE inhibitor monitoring
text: ACE inhibitors can increase potassium and affect kidney function; monitor labs after initiation or dose change.
